ac469fe0288f.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
ac469fe0288f.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
ac469fe0288f.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

05e17d028278.title: Renew formal trust proof before it becomes a visible drag
05e17d028278.description: Last inspected 2.5 years ago. A stale inspection date erodes trust scoring and signals to customers that compliance isn't actively managed. Request a voluntary re-inspection once you're confident of a strong result.
05e17d028278.expected_upside: Fresh compliance proof, trust signal renewal
05e17d028278.management_implication: Stale trust is a hidden ceiling on your overall position.

1e22e32360bc.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
1e22e32360bc.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

1f78f6f5f277.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
1f78f6f5f277.description: You deliver a strong experience but your online presence doesn't make it easy to act on. Can a new customer confirm your hours, see your menu, and book — all within 60 seconds on their phone? If not, that's your fix list.
1f78f6f5f277.management_implication: Interest without conversion is vanity traffic.
